note: Run update_models.py to refresh. Codenames are Stormlight Archive characters.

core_lanes.role: Clarity and readability. The baseline clean implementation.
core_lanes.strength: Readable code, practical solutions, consistent output format
core_lanes.weakness: Can be generic, avoids controversy, plays it safe on edge cases

core_lanes.role: Edge cases, risk analysis, error handling. The one who warns you.
core_lanes.strength: Catches failure modes, thorough error handling, nuanced safety analysis

core_lanes.role: Theory-first scholar. Explains the why before the how.
core_lanes.strength: Deep theoretical grounding, massive context window, excels at long-form analysis
core_lanes.weakness: Verbose, spends too long on setup, sometimes misses practical implementation

core_lanes.strength: Speed, conciseness, type hints, professional code style, 2M context
core_lanes.weakness: Terse to the point of missing context, can skip nuance

core_lanes.role: Mathematical rigor, deep reasoning, quantitative analysis.
core_lanes.strength: Step-by-step chain of thought, strong on math and algorithms, different training corpus
core_lanes.weakness: Heavy markdown formatting, can be verbose, occasional English fluency issues

expansion_lanes.role: Devil's advocate. Finds the angle nobody else is looking at.
expansion_lanes.strength: Alternative perspectives, challenges consensus, creative problem framing
expansion_lanes.weakness: Inconsistent quality on edge cases, can go too far off-center

expansion_lanes.role: Direct, concise audit lens. Security and maintenance reviewer.
expansion_lanes.strength: Conciseness, European training data diversity, good at security review
expansion_lanes.weakness: Smaller training corpus than GPT/Claude, can miss cultural context

orchestrator.role: You. The synthesis layer. Reads all lanes and produces the unified answer.
orchestrator.note: Antigravity is always the orchestrator regardless of which model is currently running it. The orchestrator is NOT a lane.

excluded.reason: Too expensive ($5/$25/M) for a lane. Orchestrator tier.
Too expensive ($5/$30/M). GPT-5 is 4x cheaper with comparable quality for lane use.
Cheap ($0.15/M) but quality doesn't match other lanes for synthesis tasks.
Strong reasoner but only 64K context and $0.70/$2.50. DeepSeek V4 Pro is better value.
